hooks.command:
echo 'CRITICAL REMINDERS AFTER COMPACTION:
- Co-Authored-By trailers FORBIDDEN in commits
- volatile crashes QBE — use globals instead
- VBlank DMA budget: ~4KB max per frame
- LEFT-TO-RIGHT arg push (not like PVSnesLib)
- VRAM writes only during VBlank or forced blank
- Always: make clean && make + full test suite before commit
- data_init_end.o MUST be linked last'
